summary.status: Domain not resolving - site not live
top_findings: Sitemap conflict: public/sitemap.xml overrides @astrojs/sitemap and self-references
FAQ page renders content twice (duplicate content issue)
Zero images across entire site - no OG images, no blog images, no infographics
No E-E-A-T signals: missing author, reviewer, about page, contact page
No authoritative outbound links to .gov sources for legal content
Domain DNS not configured - site unreachable
Cache-Control meta tags disable all browser caching
quick_wins: Delete public/sitemap.xml to let Astro sitemap plugin manage it
Remove duplicate FAQ rendering in faq.astro (line 52-54)
Remove Cache-Control/Pragma/Expires meta tags from BaseLayout
Add default OG image to BaseLayout
Fix title logic in BaseLayout to always include brand suffix

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Astro static generation - fully crawlable HTML

findings.title: Sitemap conflict - public/sitemap.xml self-references
findings.description: public/sitemap.xml is a hand-coded sitemap index pointing to sitemap-index.xml. The @astrojs/sitemap plugin generates sitemap-index.xml automatically. The manual file creates a circular reference.
findings.recommendation: Delete public/sitemap.xml entirely. Let @astrojs/sitemap manage all sitemap generation.

findings.title: Domain not resolving
findings.description: DNS lookup for isadhdadisability.com fails. Site is completely unreachable.
findings.recommendation: Configure DNS records and deploy to a hosting platform (Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, or Netlify recommended).

findings.title: No custom 404 page
findings.description: No 404.astro found in src/pages. Static hosting will show platform default 404.
findings.recommendation: Create src/pages/404.astro with site navigation and search.

findings.title: Missing critical OG meta tags
findings.description: og:url, og:site_name, og:locale all missing from BaseLayout.
findings.recommendation: Add og:url, og:site_name, and og:locale to BaseLayout head.

findings.title: No security headers
findings.description: No CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Strict-Transport-Security headers configured.
findings.recommendation: Configure security headers at the hosting/CDN layer.

findings.title: Cache-Control meta disables caching
findings.description: Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store meta tag hurts Core Web Vitals for returning visitors.
findings.recommendation: Remove cache meta tags. Use CDN-level cache headers instead.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: 14 pages covering ADA, school, workplace, SSDI, Section 504, international comparison, rights checklist, accommodations guide, 50+ FAQ, 3 blog articles
Clear H1-H2-H3 hierarchy on all pages
Actionable step-by-step guides (504 evaluation, SSDI application)
No thin content pages - all have substantive content

findings.title: E-E-A-T signals completely absent
findings.description: No author attribution, no reviewer credentials, no About page, no Contact page. Legal/medical content requires strong E-E-A-T signals for Google ranking.
findings.recommendation: Add author/reviewer bylines, create About and Contact pages, add medical/legal reviewer credentials.

findings.title: No authoritative outbound links
findings.description: Legal content does not link to any .gov sources (ada.gov, eeoc.gov, ssa.gov). This weakens credibility and E-E-A-T.
findings.recommendation: Add links to primary legal sources: ADA text, EEOC guidance, SSA listings, Section 504 regulations.

findings.title: Some pages content-thin
findings.description: /workplace (~400 words), /rights (~350 words), /by-country entries are brief.
findings.recommendation: Expand to 800+ words with more case studies, examples, and actionable advice.

findings.title: Only 3 blog articles
findings.description: Limited blog content for an information site. Regular publishing signals freshness to Google.
findings.recommendation: Publish 2-4 new articles per month targeting long-tail keywords.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Well-optimized title tags with target keywords
Meta descriptions present on all pages
Canonical URLs set on every page

findings.title: FAQ page renders content twice
findings.description: faq.astro lines 52-54 render all FAQ questions twice in the DOM. Google may view this as duplicate/spam content.
findings.recommendation: Remove one of the two faqCategories.map() blocks in faq.astro.

findings.title: Title logic prevents brand suffix
findings.description: BaseLayout pageTitle logic skips brand suffix when title contains 'ADHD' - which is almost every page. Multiple pages lack brand identification in title.
findings.recommendation: Simplify to: `${title} | Is ADHD a Disability` for all pages.

findings.title: No table of contents on long articles
findings.description: Long pages (ada, school, ssdi) have multiple H2 sections but no TOC. TOC helps Google generate featured snippets.
findings.recommendation: Add anchor-linked TOC component for pages with 4+ H2 sections.

findings.title: Breadcrumbs lack structured data
findings.description: Breadcrumb navigation is plain HTML without BreadcrumbList schema.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema to match breadcrumb HTML.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Article schema on blog posts and key pages (ada, ssdi, school)

findings.title: 5 pages missing all schema
findings.description: /workplace, /rights, /accommodations, /by-country, /section-504 have zero structured data.
findings.recommendation: Add Article or WebPage schema to all remaining pages.

findings.title: Article schema incomplete
findings.description: Article schema missing author, datePublished, dateModified, publisher, image fields.
findings.recommendation: Complete Article schema with all recommended fields for rich results eligibility.

findings.title: No WebSite schema on homepage
findings.description: Missing WebSite + SearchAction schema prevents Google sitelinks searchbox.
findings.recommendation: Add WebSite schema with SearchAction to homepage.

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList schema
findings.description: All pages have breadcrumb HTML but no corresponding BreadcrumbList JSON-LD.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList schema to BaseLayout.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Astro SSG - minimal JS, fast HTML
Minimal JavaScript (only menu toggle and URL cleanup)

findings.title: Google Fonts render-blocking
findings.description: 5 font weights (400-800) loaded from Google Fonts CDN. External font request is LCP bottleneck.
findings.recommendation: Use @fontsource/inter for local font hosting, or reduce to 3 weights. Use font-display: optional.

findings.title: Cache-Control disables browser caching
findings.description: Meta tags set no-cache, no-store. Returning visitors re-download all resources.
findings.recommendation: Remove cache meta tags. Configure proper cache headers at CDN level.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: FAQ content is well-structured with clear Q&A pairs
Content covers a focused topic comprehensively
Clear heading hierarchy aids AI parsing

findings.title: No llms.txt file
findings.description: Missing /llms.txt prevents AI crawlers (ChatGPT Browse, Perplexity) from quickly understanding site structure.
findings.recommendation: Create /public/llms.txt with site overview, page descriptions, and content map.

findings.title: No authoritative outbound links
findings.description: AI search engines prefer citing content backed by authoritative sources. No .gov links present.
findings.recommendation: Link to ADA, EEOC, SSA, Section 504 primary sources.

findings.title: Missing Key Takeaways blocks
findings.description: Pages lack TL;DR / Key Takeaways summaries that AI engines prefer for citation snippets.
findings.recommendation: Add a concise bullet-point summary at the top of each content page.

findings.title: No RSS feed
findings.description: No RSS/Atom feed for AI crawlers to discover new content automatically.
findings.recommendation: Add astro-rss or similar integration for feed generation.

findings.title: Zero images across entire site
findings.description: No img tags on any page. No OG images, no blog featured images, no infographics, no author photos. ogImage prop defaults to empty string.
findings.recommendation: 1) Add default OG image (1200x630) to BaseLayout. 2) Add featured images to blog posts. 3) Add relevant illustrations to core pages. 4) Add author photos if applicable.

phases.name: Phase 2: Content & E-E-A-T Enhancement
items: Add author/reviewer attribution to all pages
Add .gov outbound links to legal content
Complete Article schema on all applicable pages

phases.name: Phase 3: AI Search & Image Optimization
items: Add Key Takeaways blocks to all pages
Add featured images to blog posts

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Monitor Core Web Vitals via Search Console
Submit to Google Search Console and Bing Webmaster Tools
